---
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Signatories

## Project team

Adrián Cidre is a forest engineer, spatial data scientist, and R package developer with a focus on geospatial data and remote sensing in forestry applications. He works as data QA specialist at a leading wildfire risk management company.

Egor Kotov is a researcher, data engineer, and R package developer specializing in spatial data, API access, and big data processing. He has previously developed packages based on the `duckdb` engine ([`{spanishoddata}`](https://github.com/rOpenSpain/spanishoddata)).

## Contributors
<!--
Who are the people who have actively helped with this proposal but
won't necessarily be on the core project team later?
-->
